You managed to get Gerolt to reforge one o' the arms of eld? <Emphasis>Gerolt</Emphasis>?
...I'm impressed. If ever you tire o' the adventurin' life, I could always use another <If(PlayerParameter(4))>woman<Else/>man</If> who knows how to <Emphasis>move</Emphasis> people.
